label: Transparent chanterelle motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a chanterelle cluster, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A cluster of chanterelle mushrooms with apricot orange caps, golden gills, trumpet shapes, subtle moss green reflected tones, oak forest warmth, crisp edges, and realistic fungal texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole cluster without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves warm orange color, ridged gills, and clustered shape.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest background, no basket, no plate, no knife, no soil bed.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Chanterelle" derived from the visible transparent chanterelle cluster cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the apricot orange caps, golden gills, moss green support tones, oak umber warmth, and dark soil contrast in the visible chanterelle cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Chanterelle, Chanterelle Cluster, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show culinary product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style culinary design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, cream stock surfaces, trumpet-gill dividers, moss accents, warm recipe and inventory hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: chanterelle apricot, golden gill, moss green, oak leaf, butter cap, forest umber, dark soil, and oak ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Chanterelle".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Chanterelle design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: This dark design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme together with the light board. Use the visible transparent chanterelle cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Chanterelle board as references. Preserve the warm culinary palette roles, workflow component language, trumpet-gill dividers, moss accents, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Chanterelle, Chanterelle Cluster, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from oak ink and dark soil, readable text from cream stock, primary accents from chanterelle apricot, status from moss green, focus from golden gill, subtle mushroom gill texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Chanterelle".
